metaTitle: Sheng Ji for Family Legacy: How Elite Families Plant Fortune for Generations
metaDescription: Li Ka-shing and Stanley Ho made headlines for it; the Wang Yung-ching vein validates it. Whole-family Sheng Ji: break your own ceiling, secure the succession, align the family's fortune. WeChat NSDG521.
metaKeywords: family legacy feng shui,tycoon sheng ji,whole family sheng ji,succession fortune,elite family ritual
h1: The Elite Family Playbook: Why Top Entrepreneurs Plant Sheng Ji — and Never Talk About It
heroSub: The same arrangement Hong Kong media attributed to Li Ka-shing and Stanley Ho. The empire you built needs heaven and earth to help your children hold it

sections.h2: The quiet consensus of the top tier

items.h3: From Wang Yung-ching to Li Ka-shing: the public record
items.content: Hong Kong media spent decades reporting tycoon Sheng Ji stories — Li Ka-shing, Stanley Ho among them. Taiwan's richest man Wang Yung-ching lies buried on the very dragon vein where Tzu Hsin Ge's site sits: a textbook reverse-water formation, and his family's cross-border empire made the vein's reputation. At the top, timing-and-land is not superstition; it is standard practice.

items.h3: Your MBA taught technique; this is the other half
items.content: At your level every course is taken, every adviser hired — the human factor is saturated. What separates the effortlessly lucky from the endlessly grinding is the other half of the triad. When EMBA classmates and chamber friends have quietly done this arrangement, the question is no longer belief but whether your moment has arrived.

items.h3: Why you rarely hear anyone admit it
items.content: Tzu Hsin Ge has served over 10,000 high-end clients — multinational owners, finance CEOs, listed-company founders — under strict confidentiality. Hence the paradox: widely practiced, never discussed. Your consultation receives the same discretion.

sections.h2: Legacy: you can protect them to eighteen; the vein protects them for life

items.h3: Equity can be transferred; fortune cannot
items.content: The deepest anxiety of the self-made is not themselves but succession. Structures and mentors can be arranged — the one thing no lawyer transfers is fortune. Planting Sheng Ji for children hands that task to the dragon vein, and the younger they are planted, the longer it serves them.

The most common arrangement: parents and children in one ceremony on one vein, the family's energy field aligned together. Master Lin's own family — all of them — is planted in this ground; families with several children can design a full arrangement with Mr. Liang.

Trusts and insurance transfer assets; Sheng Ji transfers fortune — both are legacy strategy, different dimensions. The lifetime version amortized over 50 years costs about 10k a year, below a major policy premium, covering every crucial moment of a child's life.

items.h3: Founder first, family follows after verification
items.content: The steady path: the principal takes the lifetime version (RMB 500,000, exclusive spot, personal attendance over two days), verifies the response within a year or two, then brings spouse and children — the single most common repeat pattern among our overseas clients, and itself the hardest evidence of effect.

items.h3: Limited schedules: whole family on the trial version
items.content: Families unable to travel can start everyone on the 5-year trial (RMB 72,000 each): no travel, couriered items, full video documentation, upgradeable any time by paying the difference. WeChat NSDG521 for a family-structure consultation.

mainEntity.name: How does a whole-family arrangement work?

acceptedAnswer.text: Typically parents and children in one ceremony on one vein. Options range from all-lifetime (exclusive spots) to starting everyone on the 5-year trial and upgrading later; Mr. Liang designs it around your family structure.

mainEntity.name: Will anyone know I did this?

acceptedAnswer.text: No. Over 10,000 high-end clients have been served under strict confidentiality — client identities are never disclosed, which is precisely why the practice stays quiet at the top.
